data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Delivery status tracking' within the SMS Reminder System. However, the evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm the functionality of delivery status tracking. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not demonstrate that the system supports this feature, leading to a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of delivery status tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for delivery status tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the delivery status tracking requirement.
